response:
This is an implementation of **Algorithm R**, the standard reservoir sampling algorithm: it selects a uniformly random sample of exactly `k` items in a single pass over an input stream of unknown total length, without ever needing to load the full stream into memory.
For every item processed after the initial first `k` items, the algorithm randomly replaces an element in the reservoir with probability `k/i` (where `i` is the current 0-indexed position in the stream), which guarantees every item seen so far has equal chance of being kept in the final sample.
